item.title: About
item.author: cipherchallenge@um6p.ma (Cipher Challenge Cryptography Edition)
item.description:
[📢✨CALL FOR APPLICATIONS] Cipher Challenge 2025 - Cryptography Edition

The UM6P College of Computing is pleased to invite students from across Morocco to take part in the Cipher Challenge 2025, a competition designed to test and celebrate cryptographic skills. Hosted on the UM6P Rabat campus, this event brings together the brightest minds to engage in an exciting intellectual challenge, with prizes rewarding outstanding performances.

📌 EVENT DETAILS

📅 Date: Saturday, April 12, and Sunday, April 13, 2025

item.title: Talks
item.author: cipherchallenge@um6p.ma (Cipher Challenge Cryptography Edition)
item.description:
• Modern Applications of Cryptography by Youssef El Housni.
Join us for an enlightening keynote presentation that delves into the
fascinating world of cryptography and its evolution from classical techniques
to modern applications. This talk will provide a comprehensive overview of how
cryptography has been traditionally used for encryption and digital signatures,
and will then explore groundbreaking advancements that are shaping the future
of secure communication and data protection.

We will begin by revisiting the foundational principles of cryptography,
highlighting its critical role in safeguarding information. From there, we will
transition to discussing some of the most exciting and innovative applications
in the field today, including:

- Homomorphic Encryption: Learn how this revolutionary technique allows
computations to be performed on encrypted data without decrypting it, enabling
secure data processing in cloud computing and beyond.
- Zero-Knowledge Proofs: Discover how these proofs enable one party to prove to
- another that they know a
value, without revealing any information about the value itself. We'll explore
real-world applications such as privacy-preserving transactions in blockchain
technologies.
- Multi-Party Computation (MPC): Understand how MPC allows
multiple parties to jointly compute a function over their inputs while keeping
those inputs private. We'll discuss its applications in collaborative data
analysis and secure voting systems.

Throughout the talk, we will provide concrete examples of how these
cryptographic techniques are being utilized in popular platforms and
technologies, including Playstation, TikTok, Apple, WhatsApp, and various
blockchains such as Bitcoin and Ethereum.  By the end of the session, attendees
will have a deeper appreciation for the critical role cryptography plays in our
digital world and the innovative ways it continues to evolve to meet new
challenges.

This keynote is designed for students and professionals alike who are
interested in the cutting-edge developments in cryptography and its practical
applications in today's technology landscape.
  • <Title 2> by <Speaker 2>.
  • <Title 3> by <Speaker 3>.
